MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack CSR: Lavon Granger.
Appearances:
Henry Shain, Esq. for Plaintiff Shain Professional Corp.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant Gwen Horn.
Total Damages of $64,022.98
Costs of $299.00
Judgment signed in open court.
